page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hpc8i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 8575C processor running at a base frequency of 2.8 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead and ensuring consistent compute performance.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high memory-to-core ratio position this instance for resource-intensive workloads that require predictable CPU performance without multi-threading interference. The combination of 512.0 GB of RAM and 100 Gbps network bandwidth makes it suitable for high-performance computing tasks, large-scale simulations, memory-intensive database deployments, and demanding enterprise applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hpc8i.32xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server instance designed for high-performance computing workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features 64 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8575C processors running at 2.8 GHz. Because the instance operates with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, it provides 64 vCPUs with no hyperthreading overhead, ensuring predictable and consistent compute execution. The hardware profile includes 512.0 GB of RAM, offering a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It does not contain local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage. This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, scientific simulations, and enterprise applications requiring dedicated CPU resources and high network throughput.

tagline: A dedicated physical core instance with high memory capacity and high-speed networking designed for demanding high-performance computing workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
